title: card.rs: meta_tag_re misses single-quoted attributes
description: meta_tag_re matches only double-quoted attribute values (uses " in the pattern). HTML allows single-quoted attributes: <meta property='og:title' content='Hello'>. These produce no captures. Result: same silent miss as the attribute-order bug — preview cards not fetched for sites that use single-quote HTML syntax. Fix: add alternation for single-quoted values in the regex.
close_reason: Fixed: meta tag regex accepts single-quoted attributes.
